message: Hey everyone. I'm pumped today about our flash sale
You know it's been 53 years since the Beatles released Abbey Road right? My favourite album
53 years already?? Wow that makes me feel old...
Indeed! We're celebrating today by promoting a flash sale on retro items from 1969

Welcome to Bez's Beatles day, the responsibility is on you to size up the problem.

 *Use `/help` at any time for a list of useful links and commands*
 *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin Start button
Clicked Start button
We're a step closer to allowing folks to pay for items from the 1960s with Bitcoin thanks to Daniel!
Think of it like time travelling!
Wow good work Daniel! Looking forward to seeing it in action in prod
erm - funny you should say that Daniel, I'm just testing my checkout service change in prod and I can't complete the payment - something's up
Sorry Daniel it's not looking good on my end either
Uh oh...here we go again
@ohi.james can you "Size up the Issue" please and keep us informed
@ohi.james it's worth having a look at the changes made earlier today first
Get this sorted ASAP!!!
:bulb: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
Hi Shay could you assist Daniel
Sure
Bob are we experiencing any customer impcat?
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
Sure, let me look at my reports
It's bad. We've started getting tickets from the EU region, customers saying they can't complete purchases, they get to the payment screen, but it fails to process
Daniel what went wrong?
No new orders have been processed in the UK region for the last 10 minutes
UK is our biggest market, accounting for 35% of our user base
We've received over 380+ complaints in that time period, all with the same failure symptoms
Social media is picking up on it too, mentions on Twitter and Reddit saying 'Checkout is broken'
Not entirely sure
We're not seeing the issue outside the UK.  Other regions seem to be unaffected
How is our customers doing? Let's put out a post letting them know we are investigating
sev-2
*Incident Number INC100066:* sev-2
:star: Incident record created
We should check the services or changes
:star: Send first comms in first 5 minutes
Just saw the incident ticket come through, can someone tell me what's going on? This sale is huge for us
Here's the detailed info on each of the changes made today
Hope this helps: <https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/external/OGU1YjE2MmE4ZmI4NGFkMjgzNzEwZGVkYjlmNzgwNWY>
Hi Bez The dev team made a new breaking change that has affected a couple of users, it is being worked on
:star: Formally assign criticality level to the incident
:star: Qualify the problem
:bulb: Form a working theory and try to validate or invalidate it
Do we think it's change-related?
Daniel it looks to be the checkout service change CHG89361
:star: Check changes done to the platform
I was able to reproduce the issue
It went out 20mins ago
Probably a good idea to check the logs
We have been able to reproduce the issue and currently working on the fix
Do you want to rollback checkout?
Yes rollback checkout
:star: Restoration over root cause analysis
My change is safe to rollback with no dependencies
I will rollback my checkout change right away
Rollback complete!
Well done Shay
Checking logs
good spot Daniel
The checkout service logs are healthy and are working as intended
The bad deployment has been rolled back and the service restored
Let me look into this deeper
I see 504 HTTP errors in the payment service, which means the application is failing to serve the requests
Daniel, haven't you made a change to payments recently, right?
My change couldn't be an issue, it was to support crypto payment, although the code hasn't been invoked yet, so I doubt that's to do with it
Could Shay's change in Checkout be skipping some validation maybe?
:bulb: Form strategy for troubleshooting, use whole team to execute
Shay Daniel what is the way forward and payment service should also be looked into as it feeds checkout
Any updates on the investigation?
:star: Form an effective investigation team
Are we back online?
Bob how are thing on the customer side?
Customers are still reporting issues with payments
Honestly, I don't think this is coming from my change. The Bitcoin feature isn't even active yet, and the frontend hasn't been updated
Could this be load-related? It's a flash sale after all
Have we figured out the root cause yet?
Shay could you also check payment service
I will take a look, but it's Daniels change and he is the SME here
Bez It is still being investigated, service has returned but not fully as the payment service is also having issues
Daniel investigate CHG89362
:star: Reviewed changes
Perhaps we can get some information from platform team
Checking, but i'm 100% sure it's fine
Tanya anything from your end that can help?
Traffic is high due to the flash sale, but nothing abnormal in CPU/memory usage
The Payments service health check is returning HTTP 504, and latency has spiked
Requests to the payments service are increasing, but the success rate dropped significantly around the time of Daniel's change
My change only introduced the crypto, which is not live yet. It shouldn't cause any problems with payments
Daniel check the logs of THE PAYMENT SERVICE
There are no crypto related errors in logs
Daniel check the logs of the shipping service
:star: Manage actions and timings
on it
:alarm_clock: - You have less than 5 minutes. You can type `/help` if you need any reminders.
Shay check the logs of the cart service
Time of the first report and Daniel's change match, i suspect it's Daniel's change
Shipping service is healthy with no errors
Checking
I would have to agree with shay
Cart service is fine
Logs are clear and service is healthy
Daniel roll back the payment service please
:star: Take command
I'm 100% confident on my change, still not happy with the rollback
Rolling back CHG89362 now....
The payment change has been successfully rolled back
Daniel I understand we are just troubleshootinh
Sorry, I missed some common library dependencies that probably caused the issue
Bez how are thing now?
:star: Cross check resolution with stakeholders
Tanya how is the traffic?
:alarm_clock: - You have less than 2 minutes. You can type `/help` if you need any reminders.
@bob
It looks much better
Reports are going down
Bob how are thing now?
I looks like we are back to normal
Can we close the incident?
well done everyone
Looks like everything's working from the frontend and checkout side again
Happy to confirm it's resolved on our end
We have identified and fixed the issue Bez

Thank you for playing, We recommend that you take 5 minutes to go and get a drink or stretch your legs.
Once you are back we ask that you complete this retrospective and feedback form, just hit I am ready when you want to start. I am ready button
